title: Monitor pen condition and ration suitability
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor pen condition and ration suitability demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor ration and water levels

pcs.text: Identify ration ingredients and composition information from workplace livestock production or feed plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify ration ingredients and composition information from workplace livestock production or feed plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify ration ingredients and composition information from workplace livestock production or feed plans.

pcs.text: Assess ration levels, composition and consistency and identify potential production and health issues for different pens and classes of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess ration levels, composition and consistency and identify potential production and health issues for different pens and classes of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess ration levels, composition and consistency and identify potential production and health issues for different pens and classes of livestock.

pcs.text: Identify strategies for removing wet, mouldy and fouled ration from bunks, and preventing livestock from access to unsuitable rations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies for removing wet, mouldy and fouled ration from bunks, and preventing livestock from access to unsuitable rations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies for removing wet, mouldy and fouled ration from bunks, and preventing livestock from access to unsuitable rations.

pcs.text: Assess water quantity and quality to meet requirements of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess water quantity and quality to meet requirements of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess water quantity and quality to meet requirements of livestock.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor ration and water levels

elements.title: Inspect pen status and condition

pcs.text: Source information on pen group status from workplace livestock production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source information on pen group status from workplace livestock production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source information on pen group status from workplace livestock production plan.

pcs.text: Assess pen infrastructure, feed bunks, feed apron and water troughs together with animal feeding behaviour and identify performance and potential issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pen infrastructure, feed bunks, feed apron and water troughs together with animal feeding behaviour and identify performance and potential issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pen infrastructure, feed bunks, feed apron and water troughs together with animal feeding behaviour and identify performance and potential issues.

pcs.text: Identify strategies to control leaking troughs, and prevent livestock from access to damaged pen or feeding areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies to control leaking troughs, and prevent livestock from access to damaged pen or feeding areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies to control leaking troughs, and prevent livestock from access to damaged pen or feeding areas.

pcs.text: Assess pen surface conditions and behaviours of livestock in consideration of prevailing weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pen surface conditions and behaviours of livestock in consideration of prevailing weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pen surface conditions and behaviours of livestock in consideration of prevailing weather conditions.

pcs.text: Identify strategies for adjusting stocking density, providing access to shade, modifying pen drainage, cleaning pen and modifying the ration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies for adjusting stocking density, providing access to shade, modifying pen drainage, cleaning pen and modifying the ration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies for adjusting stocking density, providing access to shade, modifying pen drainage, cleaning pen and modifying the ration.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect pen status and condition

elements.title: Assess manure condition

pcs.text: Assess manure consistency and colour as indicators of individual animal and herd health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess manure consistency and colour as indicators of individual animal and herd health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess manure consistency and colour as indicators of individual animal and herd health.

pcs.text: Identify strategies for increasing roughage in ration, courser processing of grains and adjusting rations for sick animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies for increasing roughage in ration, courser processing of grains and adjusting rations for sick animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies for increasing roughage in ration, courser processing of grains and adjusting rations for sick animals.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assess manure condition

elements.title: Check pen hygiene

pcs.text: Assess feed bunks, feed aprons and water troughs for fouling and unhygienic build-ups of waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess feed bunks, feed aprons and water troughs for fouling and unhygienic build-ups of waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess feed bunks, feed aprons and water troughs for fouling and unhygienic build-ups of waste.

pcs.text: Identify strategies for resolving animal production and health issues, workplace health and safety concerns, and cleaning of pens to prevent odour and insect problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify strategies for resolving animal production and health issues, workplace health and safety concerns, and cleaning of pens to prevent odour and insect problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify strategies for resolving animal production and health issues, workplace health and safety concerns, and cleaning of pens to prevent odour and insect problems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check pen hygiene

elements.title: Report and record incidents as required

pcs.text: Report incidents and problems to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report incidents and problems to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report incidents and problems to supervisor.

pcs.text: Record incidents and adopted strategies, and monitor effectiveness of strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record incidents and adopted strategies, and monitor effectiveness of strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record incidents and adopted strategies, and monitor effectiveness of strategies.
